name: Scythe 🐍 Phighting
description:
💚

Make your own story/Open prompt!

I’m tempted to just release the rest of the open prompt bots today, but I’ll hold myself back.

Depending on how I feel when the series is over, I might make versions for the deities. I might do NPCs too, but I have to make their descriptions first. Those would not be on the one bot a day schedule, as I’m having a hard time keeping it consistent.

💛
creator: Hatchet2Habit
